info.title: RepoGate.Agent.CLI
info.description: RepoGate CLI - AI-powered repository analysis agent that discovers user journeys, generates Playwright-ready test scenarios, and scores test coverage for CI/CD pipelines.

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: RepoGate CLI - Repository analysis agent for CI/CD pipelines

commands.name: scan
commands.description: Scan the current repository and generate an analysis payload

commands.name: analyze
commands.description: Scan, submit to server, and wait for analysis results

commands.name: report
commands.description: Fetch and display a comprehensive analysis report

commands.name: export
commands.description: Export analysis data as JSON or Playwright spec files

commands.name: insights
commands.description: View brain intelligence: features, journeys, skeleton, test cases
